'''Del Sato''' was a thirty-year employee of [[Core Courier Service]] and [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]] aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Messenger (starship)|''Messenger'']], under the command of [[Taryn Clancy]]. After his ship was commandeered by [[Jak Bremen]] during the retreat from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], he decided to retire, having had quite enough excitement.<ref name="Retreat from Coruscant" />

He was a fan of [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] actress [[Serra Hailey]].<ref name="Retreat from Coruscant" />
